_note: (1) All of Noah's children: Shem (already in the line), Ham, Japheth (Gen 5:32, 6:10, 10). (2) Parents of the biblical spouses, where scripture names them -- this exposes the real intermarriage inside Terah's house. Sarah was Terah's own daughter, Abraham's half-sister (Gen 20:12). Rebekah was daughter of Bethuel son of Nahor (Abraham's brother) and Milcah (Gen 22:23, 24:15,24). Leah & Rachel were daughters of Laban son of Bethuel (Gen 29:16) -- so Isaac and Jacob both married cousins. Bathsheba was daughter of Eliam (2 Sam 11:3). Sorts after 07/07b so all anchors exist. NOTE: Nahor here (NAHORBRO) is Abraham's BROTHER, distinct from the ancestor Nahor (Gen 11:22).
